message:
fix(session): gracefully handle missing pi_session_meta table; reject directory paths in file tool

session_sqlite.rs:
- Replace map_outcome error propagation with match fallback to empty
  Vec when querying pi_session_meta, preventing crashes on old session
  databases that lack the meta table
- Run full INIT_SQL (including CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS) before
  appending entries, ensuring pi_session_meta exists for legacy DBs
  that only had PRAGMA journal_mode = WAL

tools.rs:
- Add is_dir() check in process_file_arguments to emit a helpful
  notice instead of attempting to read directory contents as a file,
  guiding users to the list tool

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
